calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Continued To Oct-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Susan Leeder appeared by telephone for Chelcee Thomas (Administrator).

Ms. Leeder stated that her Client was out of town most of the Summer, that she has all of the updates, that she is meeting with her Client on Wednesday and that she can do a supplemental declaration by the end of this week. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to October 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To May-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Leeder for petitioner Chelcee Thomas.

Ms. Leeder reported that she had efiled a waiver of account and petition for final distribution, with a hearing date set for May 2, 2018. The Court ordered the status hearing off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Susan Leeder appeared by telephone for Chelcee Thomas.

Mr. Leeder requested a 60-day continuance stating that they had an issue with getting information on one particular account, that they just got it last week, that the inventory and appraisal should be in very shortly and that it is being wrapped up with the Probate Referee. Status on close of estate is continued to March 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Jan-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Susan Leeder for Chelcee Thomas.

Ms. Leeder stated that she did not realize they had a Referee assigned, that there is no real property, that she sent the inventory and appraisal to the Referee, that she is waiting to receive it back and that she should be able to wrap it up rather quickly. Status on close of estate is continued to January 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
